title: CaseAction
description: An aggregate report of actions taken on Cash Assistance and SNAP cases in a period — rejections, closings, and reopenings — broken out by reason code, council district, race, age band, and sex. AGGREGATE ONLY: these are the closest published twin to an individual application/case, but they are counts, not records. Canonical schema reconciling 'Cash Assistance and SNAP Cases Rejections' (g6pg-qint, 75 columns), 'Closed' (5fs5-yi3e), 'Reopenings' (5uf6-jjmy), and 'Reopenings with a Missed Benefit' (28gm-7ump). There is NO Open Data or public API for the individual case itself — that lives only in the ACCESS HRA portal (see benefits-application.json).

action.description: Which case-action dataset this row comes from.

assistanceType.description: 'Type of Government Assistance' (Cash Assistance or SNAP).

reasonCode.description: 'NYS WMS Rejection Code' or equivalent reason code.

total.description: 'Total' actions of this type/reason in the period.

byCouncilDistrict.description: Counts keyed by NYC council district ('CD 01' … 'CD 51', 'Unknown CD').

byRace.description: Counts by race/ethnicity (African American, Asian, Caucasian, Hispanic, Native American, Pacific Islander, Multi-ethnic, Unknown Race).

limitedEnglishProficiency.description: Counts by LEP flag ('Has Limited English Proficiency (Yes)'/'(No)').

reasonableAccommodation.description: Counts by reasonable-accommodation flag ('Has Reasonable Accommodation (Yes)'/'(No)').
